title: Fast Links
description: Removes the confirmation screen for clicking links to save your precious time.
body:
Fast Links allows you to open a link in chat, on signs and in books without needing to use the confirmation screen. 

This mod includes a config screen to change what the mod does, you can either make it open the link when clicking it, or make it copy the link if you dont trust the link.

To keep you safe when using the mod, there is an included safety information screen button on the config screen. 

# Dependencies:

- Fabric API: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
- Mod Menu (If you want to access to the config screen): https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu
